query:
SELECT
                        n.id,
                        n.event_id,
                        n.event_type,
                        n.status,
                        n.retry_count,
                        n.total_attempts,
                        n.last_error,
                        n.payload,
                        n.event_timestamp,
                        n.created_at,
                        n.updated_at,
                        COALESCE(e.recipient_email, n.recipient_id) AS "recipient_email!",
                        e.recipient_name,
                        e.from_override,
                        e.sender_account,
                        e.send_mode,
                        e.group_retry_mode,
                        e.cc,
                        e.bcc,
                        e.attachments,
                        e.to_recipients
                    FROM notification_log n
                    LEFT JOIN email_notification_log e ON e.notification_id = n.id
                    WHERE n.event_id = $1
                      AND n.channel  = $2
                      AND COALESCE(e.recipient_email, n.recipient_id) = ANY($3)
                    ORDER BY n.created_at
                    LIMIT 500
